summary: Made two surgical seam edits: rewrote the opening paragraph to avoid mirroring Chapter 10's bell-centered entry while preserving the same scene information, and clarified the closing reference to the next naming bell as occurring tomorrow afternoon for a cleaner handoff into the following chapter's naming sequence.
edits: Reframed the opening around rain-damp coals under the western overhang instead of Fasa arriving on the bell.
Preserved Fasa's kitchen-versus-naming insight while keeping the chapter's original kitchen setup intact.
Changed the late 'Tomorrow' naming-bell reference to 'Tomorrow afternoon' to align the chapter exit with the next chapter's bell timing.
